title: thelypteris sericea
intro: Thelypteris sericea, also known as the silky fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Thelypteris sericea include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and promoting healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically to the affected area.
